name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling, supporting OGG and M4A formats with smart time-slot management.
overview: Automated online radio streaming to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots, with automatic random music fill for unscheduled hours.

versions.changelog:
- Fixed checkbox overlapping text label
- Removed custom CSS overrides that conflicted with Jellyfin native styles
- Form elements now use Jellyfin native emby-input, emby-select, emby-checkbox styling
- Buttons use Jellyfin native emby-button styling
- Cleaner schedule table and status grid styling

- Fixed blank configuration page (rewrote as single inline div with embedded script)
- Tabbed config dashboard: Configuracion, Programacion, Estado
- Proper Jellyfin localnav tab navigation
- All JavaScript inline (no external script dependencies)
- Stable config load/save via ApiClient
- Schedule CRUD with table editing
- Status monitoring tab with streaming info

- Initial alpha release
- Icecast server streaming support (OGG Vorbis / M4A AAC)
- Weekly schedule programming (Monday-Friday)
- Jellyfin playlist integration
- Smart time-slot management
- Random music fill for unscheduled slots
- Audio bitrate configuration (32-320 kbps)
- Stream metadata (name, description, genre)
